mandate: Build escalation email notifications via Resend when messages escalate
keyFindings: Resend integration pattern was already established in the codebase (waitlist + circle invites) — followed the same from address and HTML structure
The couples table has both email and partner_email columns — notifications go to both
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL env var does not exist yet — the notification falls back to hardcoded vercel URL until it is added
whatWorked: Placing notification steps as the last Inngest step before return in each escalation path. Independent retry semantics mean a Resend failure never blocks the pipeline.
recommendationsForNextAgent: When NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL is added to the environment, the hardcoded fallback in lib/notifications/escalation.ts will automatically be superseded. The dashboard inbox link in the email assumes /dashboard/inbox is the correct route — verify this matches the actual inbox route.
spiritContribution: Closed the trust gap. Escalated messages now actively reach the couple rather than waiting silently in the dashboard.
